and-so-can-you.description: conformist — a whole-repo cross-format linter and scaffolder encoding amarbel-llc/eng's eng-*(7) conventions as enforceable rules; home for cross-repo lint & rewrite tooling

bob.description: MCP servers and CLI tools — currently exposing lux and caldav

chrest.description: CLI, MCP server, and browser extensions for managing Chrome/Firefox and capturing web content per the nebulous capture protocol

clown.description: Nix wrapper for Claude Code with hierarchical prompts, default-deny Bash/auto-mode, parameterized plugin loading via mkCircus, and HTTP MCP server orchestration

crap.description: Command Result Accessibility Protocol — a TAP fork for human-readable script output trees with ANSI display hints, locale-aware numbers, status lines, and streaming

cutting-garden.description: Filesystem-tree capture/restore CLI atop madder's blob store

dodder.description: an immutable cryptographic object graph with a robust and recursive type system that takes the best parts of Git, Nix, and Zettelkasten and allows you manage content, knowledge, builds, deployments and more.

doppelgang.description: Find duplicate packages in a Nix closure, sorted by wasted bytes.

eng.description: Nix monorepo aggregating dotfiles, system packages, devshells, plugins, and 30+ project repos; published to FlakeHub

igloo.description: amarbel-llc/igloo — overlay flake providing Nix build-support helpers, pins, and package additions on top of nixpkgs.

madder.description: Content-addressable blob store with opaque encryption, compression, syncing, and packfiles — Go library and CLI

maneater.description: Local semantic search engine with pluggable corpora and llama.cpp embeddings — includes builtin support for man pages, extensible to arbitrary text collections

moxy.description: MCP proxy aggregating child servers behind one connection, with result caching, progressive disclosure, composable result URIs, a declarative micro-MCP framework, and per-tool permission policy

nebulous.description: NewsBlur MCP server and Web Capture Archive Protocol orchestrator — local-first feed/story index, plus URL preservation into a content-addressed blob store via chrest + madder

purse-first.description: Nix-based package framework for Claude Code: bundles CLIs, MCP servers, and skills into composable plugins; ships go-mcp/rust-mcp libraries and a marketplace CLI

spinclass.description: Git worktree session manager for parallel workstreams — orchestrates configurable session entrypoints (shells, agents, etc.) and lifecycle hooks via hierarchical sweatfile config

stats-me.description: Personal stats: home-manager / nix-darwin module wrapping statsd, run under Bun

tacky.description: macOS pasteboard CLI — copy/paste typed content (HTML, plain text, multi-UTI) and list current UTIs

tommy.description: Go TOML library and CLI with round-trip-preserving CST and codegen for type-safe Decode/Encode methods — keeps comments, whitespace, and formatting intact

xdg.description: Fork of freedesktop.org xdg-specs with draft XDG_LOG_HOME and XDG_LOG_DIRS extensions
